info.prompt:
anime art of a breathtaking shot of a teenage Indian girl with light golden skin and dark caramel hair, standing in a remote mountainous landscape. She wears a flowing long pink dress with intricate white floral patterns, cinched at the waist with a matching belt that accentuates her youthful frame. Her bare feet rest on a rocky patch of dirt dotted with wildflowers, as she thoughtfully lifts one hand to adjust her loose curls. The backdrop features jagged cliffs under a sky painted in soft dawn hues, with a lone eagle adding rustic charm. The mood is whimsical, captured in natural light with a slight breeze lifting her hem. watercolor textures enhance the dreamy aesthetic., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
